ddls:
CREATE TABLE "networks" (
  "network_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network */,
  "network_name" TEXT /* Name of the network */,
  "network_type" TEXT /* Type of network (e.g., LAN, WAN) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the network */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the network */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the network was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the network was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the network category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the network category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_category_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network category assignment */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network being assigned to a category */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category being assigned to the network */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_category_assignments_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES network_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_category_assignments_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES networks ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subnets" (
  "subnet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subnet */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network the subnet belongs to */,
  "subnet_name" TEXT /* Name of the subnet */,
  "hosts" INTEGER /* Number of hosts in the subnet */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the subnet */,
  "host_bits" INTEGER /* Number of host bits in the subnet */,
  "subnet_mask" TEXT /* Subnet mask */,
  "gateway" TEXT /* Gateway IP address */,
  "dns" TEXT /* DNS server IP address */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the subnet */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the subnet was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the subnet was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subnet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subnets_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES networks ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subnet_addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subnet address */,
  "subnet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subnet the address belongs to */,
  "subnet_address" TEXT /* Subnet address */,
  "broadcast_address" TEXT /* Broadcast address */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the subnet address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subnet_addresses_subnet_id FOREIGN KEY ("subnet_id") REFERENCES subnets ("subnet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ip_addresses" (
  "ip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each IP address */,
  "subnet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subnet the IP address belongs to */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address */,
  "host_name" TEXT /* Name of the host assigned the IP address */,
  "mac_address" TEXT /* MAC address of the host */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the IP address */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the IP address was assigned */,
  "released_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the IP address was released */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ip_addresses_subnet_id FOREIGN KEY ("subnet_id") REFERENCES subnets ("subnet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, network administrator) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit event */,
  "subnet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subnet that was changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., add, edit, delete) */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_subnet_id FOREIGN KEY ("subnet_id") REFERENCES subnets ("subnet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
